languages.text: "Лукха, наш хирургеон, отправился на юг, к воротам. На передовую, как и положено медику. Думаю, разыскивает тех, кого еще можно спасти".
"Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."
languages.original_text: "Лукха, наш хирургеон, отправился на юг, к воротам. На передовую, как и положено медику. Думаю, разыскивает тех, кого еще можно спасти".

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."
"Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

"Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south from the landing pad with the fifth medichirurgical detachment. Right to the front, to the gate, as it should be. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."
"Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."
"Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

languages.text: 「ルハ、我々の外科医は、第5の外科隊と共に、着陸地点から南へ行った。正面、ゲートのところへ、当然のことだ。彼は、まだ救える人を探していると思う」
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south from the landing pad with the fifth medichirurgical detachment. Right to the front, to the gate, as it should be. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: 「ルハ、我々の外科医は、第5の外科隊と共に、着陸地点から南へ行った。正面、ゲートのところへ、当然のことだ。彼は、まだ救える人を探していると思う。」

languages.text: «Lukha, nuestro cirujano, fue al sur, a la puerta. En primera línea, como buen oficial de medicae. Creo que sigue buscando gente a la que pueda salvar».
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: «Lukha, nuestro cirujano, fue al sur, a la puerta. En primera línea, como buen oficial de medicae. Creo que sigue buscando gente a la que pueda salvar».

languages.text: "Lukha, unser Chirurgeum, wollte nach Süden zum Tor. An die Front, wie ein richtiger Medicae. Ich nehme an, er sucht dort nach Überlebenden."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, unser Chirurgeum, wollte nach Süden zum Tor. An die Front, wie ein richtiger Medicae. Ich nehme an, er sucht dort nach Überlebenden."

languages.text: « Lukha, notre chirurgeon, s'est rendu au sud de la porte. Sur le front, comme un officier de medicae digne de ce nom. Je crois qu'il est en train de chercher des survivants pouvant encore être soignés. »
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: « Lukha, notre chirurgeon, s'est rendu au sud de la porte. Sur le front, comme un officier de medicae digne de ce nom. Je crois qu'il est en train de chercher des survivants pouvant encore être soignés. »

languages.text: “我们的船医卢卡去了南边的城门，直接上了最前线，真是医务官的典范。我想，他是在寻找还有生还希望的人。”
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: “我们的船医卢卡去了南边的城门，直接上了最前线，真是医务官的典范。我想，他是在寻找还有生还希望的人。”

languages.text: "Cerrahımız Lukha, güneydeki kapıya gitti. Gerçek bir sıhhiyeci gibi cephe hattına gitti. Sanırım hâlâ kurtarılabilecek birilerini arıyor."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, went south to the gate. Right to the front, like a proper medicae. I think he's looking for anyone who can still be saved."

traits.locale_text: "Cerrahımız Lukha, güneydeki kapıya gitti. Gerçek bir sıhhiyeci gibi cephe hattına gitti. Sanırım hâlâ kurtarılabilecek birilerini arıyor."
